spec_match.rationale: Masterful implementation! Moves the entire processor track readable loop into a dedicated Worker thread and posts counter telemetry to the main thread.

interactive.rationale: Exemplary interactive pattern. Draws an animated waveform on canvas, translates canvas into streams, transfers tracks to workers, binds consumer sliders, and lists messages in a real-time postMessage log terminal.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Beautifully demonstrates the recommended production worker-based design architecture.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles transferable track boundaries safely with non-transferable fallbacks, captures thread compilation failures, and terminates loops clean.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Superb styling featuring clean thread-mapping diagrams, dark console displays, and monospace labels.

runtime_evidence.rationale: The post-fix direct browser sweep loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Falls back to clearly labelled simulated worker counters when a synthetic track cannot be transferred, instead of attempting an invalid clone. Post-fix validation passed.
